text: I feel intrigued by my surroundings—these are spaces of inquiry and discovery. The glass walls and orderly chairs suggest preparation for a gathering of minds, perhaps a seminar or a discussion. Moving into the vibrant exhibit, I am drawn to the celebration of research and development. The playful colors and thoughtful displays evoke a sense of curiosity and possibility. I feel simultaneously humbled by the pursuit of knowledge and energized by the spirit of innovation here.
